name: stack-add of a token that is neither a namespace nor a known technology is rejected (cite-or-decline)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload x --stack-add bogusxyz --classify 2>e.err; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'invalid=bogusxyz' e.err && echo unknown-stack-rejected 1>&2
